summary: Full backend and frontend testing of the human audio / AI TTS feature. 20/20 backend tests pass. All 11 frontend requirements verified via Playwright. The audio-button-flip bug from iteration_9 is now CONFIRMED FIXED.
critical_code_review_comments: tts_service.py: If a letter has audio_file set but the actual .mp3 file is missing from /data/audio/human/, read_bytes() raises FileNotFoundError (not a LookupError), which would return a 500 instead of 404. This is unlikely given all 54 files are present, but worth noting for future file management.

For num_0?type=auto (no cache) the AI TTS will call OpenAI at runtime — no pre-caching is done at startup. If OpenAI is unavailable, the endpoint returns 503. Consider pre-caching all 14 AI-only letters at app startup.
useAudioPlayer.js: silently swallows errors (if response.ok is false, returns without error). User gets no feedback when audio fails.

features_tested.GET /api/alphabet 70 letters with has_hu: PASS - 70 letters, all have boolean has_human_audio field
features_tested.GET /api/tts/num_1?type=human 404: PASS - correct 404 for missing human audio
features_tested.GET /api/tts/sa?type=auto 200 human pref: PASS - returns identical bytes to type=human
features_tested.Flashcard H + AI buttons for sa (has hum: PASS - audio-button-human and audio-button-ai both present
features_tested.Flashcard single AI button for num_1 (no: PASS - only audio-button present, no H button
features_tested.Settings modal Voice section Human/AI to: PASS - voice-human-btn and voice-ai-btn present, toggle works
features_tested.Audio buttons do NOT trigger card flip (: PASS - card stays at rotateY(0deg) after H and AI button clicks
PASS - card stays at rotateY(180deg) after clicking H button on back
features_tested.iteration_9 bug fixed: PASS - framer-motion onTap checks event.target.closest('button') to prevent flip

context_for_next_testing_agent: Audio TTS feature is fully working. Backend: /api/alphabet returns 70 letters with has_human_audio bool; /api/tts/{id}?type=human|ai|auto all work correctly. 54 human mp3 files in /app/backend/data/audio/human/. AI cache has num_1.mp3 only - testing num_0?type=auto will trigger a live OpenAI call. Frontend: H+AI dual buttons for letters with human audio, single AI button for letters without. Settings modal voice toggle persists to localStorage. The audio-button-flip bug (iteration_9) is FIXED via framer-motion onTap checking event.target.closest('button').

rca_of_fix.bug: Audio button click triggered card flip (iteration_9)
rca_of_fix.fix_applied: Flashcard.jsx onTap handler now checks `if (event?.target?.closest('button')) return;` before flipping. This works because framer-motion's onTap fires after recognizing a tap gesture (not on raw pointerdown), and at that point event.target correctly reflects the clicked element including its closest button ancestor.
